title: JoeSMP
description: JoeSMP is a community Minecraft server using a performance focused modpack to give players a smooth, lag-free multiplayer experience.
body:
This is the essential modpack for the JoeSMP Minecraft Server. It's filled with a variety of lightweight performance mods and quality of life mods which enhance play together without changing the vanilla Minecraft experience while providing the best performance and stability.

This pack is required to ensure everything works properly and to reduce lag when playing on JoeSMP. It's a recommended pack for anyone looking for a very simple, barebones approach to a basic community server experience without extra clutter or game-changing mods.

There are no cheats, hacks, or advantages only slight adjustments to make easier server operation and a more enjoyable experience for every player.
